visual_description:
The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a violent confrontation. It begins with a man letting out a high-pitched, panicked scream, filled with terror and pain. A close-up shot focuses on an older man with dark, slicked-back hair and a worried expression. He is wearing a dark green collared shirt. To his right, the back of another person's head is visible. The background is a dimly lit, warm-toned interior, possibly a shop or restaurant, with out-of-focus lights and what appear to be white, round objects on a shelf. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man in a light-colored blazer and a floral shirt. He is pointing a handgun directly at the camera with a determined look. The background is a simple, out-of-focus interior. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right.

The shot changes to a wider view, showing the man in the blazer from the side as he continues to aim his gun. Another man in a light blue shirt is visible in the background, moving away from the camera. The setting appears to be a narrow alley or street at night, with a red
